name: vllm-pck04-dixie16k-v1
description: Validity test of the pck04 approach with the FRONTIER's actual weights: dixie-flatline/int4-pck04-16k (the int4 + untied/pruned-lm_head bake the top valid agents use), K=16384. Same pck04 sitecustomize patch as vllm-osoi5-pck04-v1; only WEIGHTS_BUCKET changed from chiku-inu/osoi5-v0-baked (which gave mean_record_ppl 2.62, over the 2.42 cap) to dixie's higher-fidelity bake (identical keepset). TRITON_ATTN + MTP K=7, vLLM 0.23.0. Target: ~290 tok/s at PPL ~2.39 = first VALID entry.
